name: hunt-target
description: Run the standard authorized hunt loop on a target — recon, probe, verify, save. Loads Burp Swiss Knife's hunt advisor, populates Burp proxy history via stealth browser, runs knowledge-driven probes, validates each suspected finding through the 7-Question Gate, and chains low-severity items into reportable impact.

arguments.name: target
arguments.description: Target URL within authorized scope (e.g. https://example.com)

rules: Never test out-of-scope domains — call check_scope first
Never send destructive payloads (DROP TABLE, rm -rf, etc.)
Use Burp Collaborator for OOB testing, never hardcoded callback domains
